title: Nie wieder Liebe!
writer: Julius Berstl, Irma von Cube, Anatole Litvak
actors: Lilian Harvey, Harry Liedtke, Felix Bressart
plot: An American millionaire, who had always bad luck with women, bets that he can live without them for five years. But after four and a half years travling around on his yacht, he rescues a lady from drowning in the English Channel.
